Why The BBA Fee Is A Steal

  • 1
    Just ₹45,000/year for Finance, Marketing or HR (₹50,000 for Digital Marketing & Data Science + AI).
  • 2
    Pay the full fee upfront and get a flat 15% discount.
  • 3
    Or split it into easy monthly EMI at 0% interest - no extra cost.
  • 4
    Only ₹2,500 one-time registration + ₹3,000/year exam fee. No hidden charges.
